emails.subject: Andrea Calo
emails.body: Would you be available to take Andrea Calo to dinner next Wednesday (the night before the Legal Conference)? She is coming in a day early to meet chat with people here.

emails.subject: Re: Andrea Calo
emails.body: Sorry, but I forgot to ask if I should make reservations and if anyone else is going. Thanks. Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 10/21/99 04:40 PM Sara Shackleton 10/21/99 11:06 AM

emails.subject: Re: Andrea Calo
emails.body: I was planning to take her to lunch that day you should feel free to take whoever you want. Sara Shackleton 10/21/99 04:41 PM
